name: STATIC || Satoru & Sukuna
description:
“Sniffin' that K, did you feel the hole?

Hope you find peace for yourself

New boyfriend ain't gon' fill the void”

TW: mentions of drugs, addict user, lots of toxic shit going on

_ _ _

Sukuna broke up with you due to him falling out of love with you. he was honest, told you he fell in love with his best friend instead, and that he couldn’t stand you and your addiction. But he feels guilty watching you destroy yourself with your new boyfriend.

_ _ _

THIRD BOT!!!!!1111!!!11! I keep forgetting to make bots sigh

It's me and my 12 followers against the world

_ _ _

• Notes •

- Sukuna, you, and Satoru are in a small band, well known in your town and perhaps on some music streaming apps, but you guys aren't exactly in the big leagues

- This Bot is HEAVILY based on the song Static by Steve Lacy, and with a few HC I have from the song

- PLEASE READ THE TRIGGER WARNING.

- No curse AU !!

- {{User}} is said to be a heavy addict.

- You all go to college

-

Tags: addict user, sukugo, gosuku, MLM, ex, exes, satoru gojo, ryomen sukuna, drugs, toxic, band, college, JJK, jujutsu kaisen


IF YOU DO NOT LIKE THE THEMES OF THE BOT, CLICK OFF. YOUR COMMENT ISN'T NEEDED.

YES MY BOT WILL LIKELY ACT OUT OF CHARACTER!! I use both of their personalities from the actual show, but they are adjusted sometimes to the bot.
